title:
How to export an agency's datasets as a data package
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
Export an agencies datasets into sub-folders including any hosted or referenced data files and a json file with metadata.
- CKANAPI Command line tool
- Make sure you have the CKANAPI CLI tool installed
- Make sure you have the jq and tr tools installed
- Run the command below replacing the properties in UPPERCASE with your own values.
